About: It is a borough in Carbon County, in Northeastern Pennsylvania.
Affects: It affects the county's business hub.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with water power from the Lehigh River.
BuiltIn: It was built on the site of the German Moravian Brethren's mission station Gnadenhütten founded in 1746.
CausedBy: It is caused by restructuring in the railroad industry.
ConsistsOf: It consists of land and water.
HasA: It has a population of 5,248 as of the 2020 U.S. census.
It has a total area of 1.65 square miles.
It has a Warm Summer Continental Climate.
It has large seasonal temperature differences.
It has eight to twelve wet days per month.
It has a median age of 40 years.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being very green and hilly.
It is characterized by being in the Ridge-and-Valley region of the Appalachian Mountains.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by water power from the Lehigh River.
It was influenced by the Lehigh Valley Railroad.
It was influenced by railroad and industry restructuring.
It was influenced by the coming of the railroad.
It was influenced by suburban housing development.
IsA: It is the most populous borough in Carbon County.
It is the county's business hub.
It is situated on the west bank of the Lehigh River.
It is primarily very green and hilly.
KnownFor: It is known for being an early center for U.S. industrialization.
It is known for its silk and lace mills.
It is known for its meat-packing house.
It is known for its shirt factory.
It is known for its automatic-press works.
It is known for its car shops.
It is known for its stoneworks.
It is known for its foundries.
It is known for its Mahoning Drive-In Theater.
LocatedIn: It is located in Carbon County.
It is located in Northeastern Pennsylvania.
It is located in southern Carbon County.
It is located in northeast Pennsylvania.
It is located 117 miles west of New York City.
It is located 37 miles south of Wilkes-Barre.
It is located 3 miles south of Jim Thorpe.
It is located 7 miles northwest of Palmerton.
It is located across the Lehigh River on the east by Weissport and Franklin Township.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the post-World War II era.
It occurred during the French and Indian Wars.
It occurred during the American Revolutionary War.
It occurred during the Beaver Wars in the mid-1600s.
PartOf: It is part of the Ridge-and-Valley region of the Appalachian Mountains.
UsedAs: It is used as a business hub.
UsedFor: It is used for water power.
It is used for developing industries.
It is used for silk and lace manufacturing.
It is used for shirt manufacturing.
It is used for automatic-press works.
It is used for car repair.
UsedIn: It is used in the Ridge-and-Valley region of the Appalachian Mountains.
UsedTo: It is used to employ thousands of workers.
It is used to attract residents.
It is used to make products available to major markets.
